title: bupleurum tenuissimum var. columnae
intro: Bupleurum tenuissimum var. columnae, also known as Chinese Bupleurum or Chaihu, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum tenuissimum var. columnae include reducing fever, alleviating liver and gallbladder disorders, and supporting immune function. Bupleurum tenuissimum var. columnae can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
